# Meport — Teach every AI who you are.

## What is Meport?
Meport is an open-source CLI tool and desktop app that creates AI personality profiles from your files and exports them to 20+ platforms. It scans your documents, asks targeted questions, and generates rule-based instructions that make AI tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, Copilot, and Ollama understand how you think, work, and communicate.

## Key Facts
- Free forever, MIT license, open source
- 100% local — zero servers, zero tracking, zero accounts
- 80+ personality dimensions across communication, work, cognitive, and personal categories
- Rule-based exports (direct instructions, not descriptions) — 85% AI compliance vs 50% for descriptions
- Pack-based profiling: 7 question packs, ~10-15 minutes
- System scanner pre-fills answers from .gitconfig, project files, AI configs
- Supports Ollama for fully offline profiling
- Available as CLI (npx meport) and desktop app (macOS, Windows, Linux)

## Supported Export Platforms
ChatGPT, Claude, Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Windsurf, Gemini, Grok, Perplexity, Poe, Ollama, Open WebUI, LM Studio, Jan.ai, AGENTS.md, MEPORT.md, MCP Server, JSON, Markdown, PDF

## How It Works
1. Drop your files (CV, notes, documents) or run npx meport
2. Meport scans files and asks a few targeted questions
3. Your answers become direct AI rules ("Be extremely direct. No softening." not "User prefers directness")
4. Export to any AI platform in its native format
5. AI finally understands you

## Links
- Website: https://meport.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/zmrlk/meport
- CLI: npx meport
- Documentation: https://meport.app/docs.html

## Creator
Built by Karol Zamarlik (ISIKO). Created because every AI tool treats you like a stranger — Meport fixes that in 5 minutes.
